title: HMI Swing Sounds
description: This is an addon for Hold My Items (HMI) that plays sounds every swing you make! (when you do Left Click or Attack/Destroy, or also doing Right Click or Use)!
body:
# HMI Swing Sounds Addon v1.1!
This is an addon for Hold My Items (HMI) that plays swing sounds every swing with your hands you make! (when you do Left Click or Attack/Destroy, or also doing Right Click or Use)!
### Latest Versions: **HMI Swing Sounds Addon v1.1 for Hold My Items 5.1.1!** **HMI Swing Sounds Addon v1.1 for Hold My Items 5.0L4!**
## Hold My Items is required! This resource pack or addon only works with Hold My Items (REQUIRED): ![builtbybit](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4b2e01bfef3086d00b3e9b184e1db33da315d4d7.png)
## ~ ~ ~ ~~~ Customizations ~~~ ~ ~ ~
There are many customizations in this addon with using Respackopts (A mod that lets you customize resource packs if it has settings)! (OPTIONAL): ![builtbybit](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3f98b51204619f8949d81b30da9e29b23dc16b83.png) • The customizations of this resource pack lets you change the volume, sound id of the swing sound to play for every swing you make, and making different conditions on how you want the swing sound to only play to items of your choosing. • A Master Toggle of the resource pack or addon if you want to disable or enable it. • An enable/disable toggle for each of the player's Mainhand and Offhand if you want to play swing sounds of each. • There are predefined preset groups for what sets of items will make your hand's swing play the swing sound! like for: - Empty Hand, - Weapons, - Tools, - Blocks, - Breaking Blocks, - Foods, Drinks, - etc. • A section in the settings for Included Items & Tags (Whitelist), and Excluded Items & Tags (Blacklist) for items & tags you want to play, and don't want to play the swings sounds with respectively. Also a Priority Toggle for whether the Included or Excluded Items & Tags will be priotized if you have the same sets of items and tags in both lists! ### • Custom Sounds • Then lastly, you can add your own **Custom Sounds**!! You can add custom sounds for this resource pack to use, by which you can do by following this tutorial!: #
### ~ ~ ~ ~~~ Options Screen Page ~~~ ~ ~ ~ ![Customizations #1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/304da04156ed068f6a273d0053064de765b6e947.png) ![Customizations #2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7c48a7401e3110630c00521369e159298f30edff.png) ### ~ ~ ~ ~~~ ~~~ ~ ~ ~
